knowledge.when: domain terms, business policy, code/status values — verify before assuming

tacit.when: edge cases, past incidents, coupling/danger zones for the area being changed

plan.when: non-trivial multi-file/multi-module plan (otherwise use the built-in step-2 planning)

verify.how: run the project's test/build/QA command; report failures verbatim
verify.when: step 5 — running tests. Execution only; do NOT use a tool that runs its own fix loop

explore.how: find-references / read-definition for external repos and symbols
explore.when: step 1 — locating code, symbols, call sites (read-only)
